title: Retire the already-merged agent-pane-orchestration worktree
action: agent-pane-orchestration was already merged into main by the user (commit 27065cc, verify green, PR #50 open upstream). Its worktree state.json says compounding-complete with next_action 'Optional: retire this worktree'. Remove the worktree dir, delete branch wt/agent-pane-orchestration, and drop its grant.

truths: git worktree list no longer shows herdr-gateway--wt--agent-pane-orchestration
node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json no longer grants herdr-gateway--wt--agent-pane-orchestration
prohibitions: Do not touch main's already-merged content

verify: git worktree list | grep -qv 'wt--agent-pane-orchestration' && ! git branch --list wt/agent-pane-orchestration | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv agent-pane-orchestration && echo CLEANUP_OK

trace.outcome: Removed the already-merged agent-pane-orchestration worktree dir, deleted wt/agent-pane-orchestration branch, dropped its grant. Main's merged content untouched.
trace.verify_command: git worktree list | grep -qv 'wt--agent-pane-orchestration' && ! git branch --list wt/agent-pane-orchestration | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv agent-pane-orchestration && echo CLEANUP_OK
